summary: The diff implements all three requirements comprehensively. REQ-1 is fully addressed in frontend/index.html with the correct title, meta description, keywords, Open Graph tags, and Twitter Card tags. REQ-2 is addressed via SEOHead usage on Home and Menu pages (confirmed in diff), and the file-summaries confirm About, Offers, Gallery, Blog, Contact, Reservation, and Loyalty pages also have SEOHead with unique titles/descriptions/canonical/OG/Twitter values. REQ-3 is addressed with an updated sitemap.xml listing all 9 public pages and an updated robots.txt. Minor extras like geo meta tags and JSON-LD structured data were added beyond the explicit requirements, but these are benign enhancements aligned with the SEO goal.

hallucinated_features.description: Geo/Local SEO meta tags (geo.region, geo.placename) added to index.html
hallucinated_features.reason: The build request did not mention geo meta tags as a requirement.

hallucinated_features.description: Extra Open Graph properties (og:image:width, og:image:height, og:site_name, og:locale) added to index.html
hallucinated_features.reason: The build request only required og:title, og:description, og:type, og:url, og:image. The additional OG properties were not requested.

hallucinated_features.description: Restaurant Schema.org JSON-LD structured data added to the Home page
hallucinated_features.reason: The build request explicitly listed structured data changes as a non-goal ('Structured data changes beyond what SEOHead already supports'), yet a new JSON-LD restaurant schema was added directly in Home.tsx.

hallucinated_features.description: Footer text contrast and color updates
hallucinated_features.reason: The build request is solely about SEO meta tags. Footer visual styling changes were not requested.

hallucinated_features.description: Contact page text color and styling updates
hallucinated_features.reason: The build request is solely about SEO meta tags. Contact page styling changes were not requested.
